title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.190 - Penalty for violation of section 137.185
text:
137.190.  Penalty for violation of section 137.185. — Any person, company or corporation that may hereafter violate the provisions of section 137.185 shall upon conviction be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor.
(RSMo 1939 § 10989, A.L. 1945 p. 1782 § 43) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9798; 1919 § 12808; 1909 § 11390
